mood: Calming, peaceful, journaling feel, emotional comfort

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the mind to breathe. Use p-8 to p-12 for containers.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid but soft. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl to feel tactile and safe. No sharp edges.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Flat Solid surfaces. Do NOT use glassmorphism for health data to avoid visual refraction. Subtle borders (border-black/5) with extremely diffuse shadows (shadow-sm).

components.cards: bg-white border border-border/50 shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] rounded-3xl p-6 transition-all hover:shadow-md
components.buttons: rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/30
components.inputs: bg-background border-border rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 p-4
components.charts: Recharts. Use simple area charts with gradients. Remove grids and axis lines for a cleaner look.
components.chat_bubbles: User: bg-primary text-white rounded-3xl rounded-tr-sm. AI: bg-secondary text-secondary_foreground rounded-3xl rounded-tl-sm.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Soft lifts (-translate-y-1) and shadow expansion. Elements should feel responsive but not erratic.
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Fade in and gentle slide up (framer-motion). Staggered children for lists.

media_and_images.rules: Use the provided URLs ONLY. No placeholders.

images.description: Fluid abstract shapes in green and beige. Use as a soft banner header behind the welcome message.
Sunrise view over a tranquil green field. Use when the user has no entries yet, promoting a fresh start.
Soothing abstract blue blurred gradient. Use as a background or cover for generated Memory Capsules.
Misty river and forest background. Use as the side panel image for login/signup.

media_and_images.icons: lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a delicate, modern feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA guidelines. Ensure tinted text_secondary is dark enough.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: ALL interactive elements must have data-testid. E.g., data-testid='journal-entry-submit-button', data-testid='chat-input-field'.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Build a modular dashboard layout: Sidebar for navigation, Main content area with top greeting.
Dashboard should include: A 'How are you feeling today?' quick entry, a weekly emotional trend chart, and a widget for recent memory capsules.
Chat Interface: Implement a sliding or modal chat interface that feels like texting a friend, not an enterprise bot.
Journal Entry: Allow rich text or simple text with a file upload button (lucide-react icons) styled minimally.
Do NOT use glassmorphism. Use flat solid surfaces with rounded corners and subtle shadows. This is a mental wellness app; clarity and warmth over tech-gloss.
When displaying the emotion chart, map the emotions to the emotion_tags colors defined in this JSON.
